subcodes.first_line: *(Omapanga ayehe yaMukuru yeso kuyandja ko oviyandjewa otja komuinyo we puma yenene mohange ku ngamwa Omuitavere, Mapang
subcodes.notes: Theory: Otjiherero instruction/compilation about offerings/donations -- fund-giving instruction. From old Otjiherero prayer book (hz 6012-6071). Not a standalone prayer -- possibly an extract from administrative tablets about the Fund.
